title: ctenitis atrorubens
intro: Ctenitis atrorubens, also known as Red Vein Tree Fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis atrorubens include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and treating various skin conditions. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
